tagline: Coffee with a point of view

hero.heading: Coffee. With ideology.
hero.subheading: A Glendale roaster pulling honest espresso since 2017. No syrups in our flat whites. No apologies for our pour-overs.

about.heading: A working roastery on Central Ave.
paragraphs: We pull every shot on a Mavam under-counter. We weigh every dose. We taste every batch before it goes into the hopper. That's the whole ideology.

Our beans come from three farms we actually visit — Finca La Esmeralda in Boquete, Jasmin Estate in Yirgacheffe, and a small lot we share with two other roasters out of Huila. The bag tells you where, when, and who.
Open early for the Adventist nurses and the Forest Lawn groundskeepers. Open late enough for the gallery crawl on Friday nights. Wifi exists but the seats are made for talking.

services.title: Espresso
services.description: Single origin or our house blend. Pulled to 36g, 18s, 92°C. Served in a warmed cup, no spoon.

services.title: Cortado
services.description: Equal-parts espresso and warm milk in a Gibraltar glass. Our most-ordered drink, three years running.

services.title: Pour Over
services.description: V60 or Kalita Wave, your choice. 22g in, 360g out. Brewed table-side. Takes four minutes — worth it.

services.title: Cold Brew
services.description: Steeped 18 hours in 5-gallon kegs. Bold, chocolatey, no bitterness. On nitro tap when available.

services.title: Pastry case
services.description: Daily-baked croissants from Proof. Sourdough bagels from Mr. Holmes. Vegan banana bread from us.

services.title: Whole bean retail
services.description: 12oz bags, roasted on Mondays and Thursdays. Subscribe in-store for a $2 discount and free decaf swap.

reviews.name: Anaís V.
reviews.text: The cortado here ruined other cortados for me. The barista actually pulls a real ristretto. Cult-favorite for a reason.

reviews.name: Greg M.
reviews.text: Beautiful space, serious about coffee. They'll talk you through the bean if you ask. They won't if you don't.

reviews.name: Pat L.
reviews.text: I'm a coffee snob and I will defend this shop with my life. The pour-overs are some of the best in LA.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Ideology Coffee 312 N Central Ave Glendale CA 91203

seo.title: Ideology Coffee — Glendale roastery and cafe
seo.description: Specialty coffee, espresso, pour-overs and cold brew. Open 7AM daily at 312 N Central Ave, Glendale.
